content:
Tap **New Chat**
2. Start typing there
3. Tap the **+**

If the new chat supports uploads, the buttons will be active immediately. This works most of the time.

---

### Option 2 — Switch models (if available)
If you see a **model selector** at the top (for example):
- text-only model
- vision / multimodal model

Switch to one that supports images/files.
